Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Precluding Defendants Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two
Off Calendar Jun-27-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted on PLAINTIFF UWE GUEHNEMANN'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Precluding Defendants Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two as follows:

The Motion for Protective Order is GRANTED: good cause exists to grant the motion because the documents pertaining to the subject property have already been produced, and because defendant/cross-complainant has not shown how documents pertaining to other projects are relevant to his claim of fraud here.

The prevailing party is to prepare a form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312 and submit it to Judge Pro Tem David M. Helbraun for review and signature.

Judge Pro Tem: David M. Helbraun, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. (302/JPT/RU)
